title: Senior Design Engineer (Wellhead)
description:
Backed by the power of Caterpillar, SPM Oil & Gas is a global provider of surface frac solutions, bringing you quality products that keep the oilfield moving. Through a distinguished network of trusted and proven oilfield products, combined with the best minds in the industry, SPM solves and prevents the most common frac site problems for operators, engineers and every vested stakeholder.

Caterpillar currently has an opportunity for a Senior Design Engineer based in Singapore. Reporting to the Engineering Manager, you will perform all engineering design functions in Product Engineering projects. This includes, but not withstanding, performing engineering design and calculations, drawings creation, organization of design reviews, and basic project management, to meet the requirements of the applicable industry standards and customer requirements. The Principal Engineer shall also be able to support and solve field issues, through identification of root causes and provide suitable solutions for the issues faced.

What You Will Do: ​

Product Engineering

  • Must be fully conversant with all aspects of the design and functionality of Surface Wellhead equipment: Conventional, Unitized and Splitter variations and all of their ancillary components.
  • Ensure clear understanding of the client’s technical specifications/drawings and design wellhead system to conform to industry and customer requirements.
  • · Generate creative solutions; translate concepts and information into images; use feedback to modify designs; apply design principles; demonstrate attention to detail
  • Identifying cost saving opportunities
  • Assist with the creation of Sales and Marketing information, providing technical data where required.
  • Identify technical gaps and communicate timely with Research and Development team to mitigate gaps.
  • Be competent to set requirements and review results of Finite Element Analysis on new or existing designs
  • Liaise with other departments including engineering, planning, sales, contract administration, legal, workshop and procurement departments
  • Site visits at customers for technical support
  • Provide technical leadership for project/product assigned.

Project Schedule

  • To create and present a planned schedule of a task
  • Keep all relevant and appropriate parties informed of progress and outcomes. Resolving issues as they become apparent.

Other Duties

  • Travel as required to support product sales, field runs and troubleshooting exercises.
  • Communicate with all levels of internal and external personnel as needed providing clear and concise reports.
  • Know and fully understand Quality Policy and comply with all requirements of the Quality Systems Manual, Operating and Technical Procedures and Workplace Instructions.
  • Must understand and comply with all safety rules and company policies.
  • Work assignments carried out to the highest quality level.
  • Perform various other duties and activities as assigned by supervisor within the physical constraints of the job.

What You Have:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent.
  • Minimum 12 years’ experience in the product design of oil field equipment, preferably in either the Surface or Subsea Wellhead disciplines.
  • Proven ability to work under pressure to meet all agreed deadlines and time scales.
  • The ability to work and communicate with all levels within the organization to accomplish common goals and directives.
  • Good written and verbal English communication skills.
  • Fluent use of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook, etc).
  • Has advanced hands-on skills in 2D and 3D Computer Aided Design (CAD), such as Solidworks and AutoCAD.

Additional Info: ​

  • This position requires working onsite five days a week.
  • Caterpillar is not currently hiring individuals for this position who now or in the future require sponsorship for employment visa status; however, as a global company, Caterpillar offers many job opportunities outside of Singapore which can be found through our employment website at www.caterpillar.com/careers.
  • International Assignment is not available.

postedCompany.description:
Caterpillar Asia Pte. Ltd. is a marketing headquarters which serves 15 countries in South East Asia stretching from India to South Korea and Mongolia.

 

The organization was established in 1965 in Hong Kong under the name of Caterpillar Far East Limited. In 1991, we moved to Singapore from Hong Kong and changed our name to Caterpillar Asia Pte. Ltd. Caterpillar Asia has improved and strengthened marketing responsibilities with 15 dealerships and more than 160 dealer branches throughout the region. To closely serve our customers in Asia, we have four district offices in Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur, Jakarta and Manila.

 

Product & Services

 

Caterpillar is a growth-oriented, high-tech global powerhouse…strong, diversified, resilient - and focused on the future. We're responding to a rapidly changing business climate and demonstrating our intent to bolster our leadership in the industries we serve through a number of well-defined initiatives. We are dedicated to realizing profitable growth, leveraging the benefits of e-business, aggressively reducing costs and improving quality - all in an effort to strengthen business processes throughout our value chain.

 

Financial

 

Caterpillar - the world leader in the manufacture of construction and mining equipment, diesel and natural gas engines, and industrial gas turbines - has set financial records for several years:

  • Sales and revenues for 1999 were $19.7 billion.
  • Profit for 1999 was $946 million.
  • Profit per share was $2.63 in 1999.
  • Exports from the United States were a stable $5.2 billion.
